Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Fixed nominal phrase (N+Loc + N + Adv comparative construction)
Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Mutual support; people helping each other reciprocally
Usage Contexts: Daily speech, family, rural cooperation, community life
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Traditional agrarian Erzya village culture emphasizing collective labor
First Example Sentence: Велева кедьсэ кедь вадрякс, и тевтне киякс шождат.
Second Example Sentence: Ми эрямо кедьсэ кедь вадрякс, апак содавтомо вейкеть.
Third Example Sentence: Сырнесь истямо, кедьсэ кедь вадрякс ансяк паро тевсэ.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: To be in a very difficult or awkward situation
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Image from livestock walking on unstable snowy ground
First Example Sentence: Мон пильгесэ ловсо ульнень экзаменонтень кисэ.
Second Example Sentence: Сон арсясь, што пильгесэ ловсо проектэнь марто.
Third Example Sentence: Тон пильгесэ ловсо, кода апак кандат документтне.

Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Associated with public assemblies in Erzya history

Third Example Sentence: Сон седе панжозь валдо мерсь мелезэнть.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: To have influence or control over someone
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Traditional metaphor linking hand to authority

Third Example Sentence: Тон апак содат, кия келень кедьсэ ули тевсэ.

Figurative Meaning (Contextualized Defin: Born to write; naturally gifted writer
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Used in literary circles in Mordovia

Third Example Sentence: Мон арсян, што тон сёрмадозь чачомо ды виев поэт.

First Example Sentence: Тенек кудосо лембе вайгель, кода кунакса.

Third Example Sentence: Гостетне арсясть, што кудосо лембе вайгель пек паро.
